title: Comparing Crew vs Graph Designs
concept: Analyzing how Crew and Graph architectures handle the same conditional task.

exercises.prompt: What is one key feature of AI architectures?

options.text: They determine how agents learn from data.

exercises.explain: AI architectures are responsible for how agents learn and respond to information.

cards.title: Crew vs Graph Designs
cards.body: Today, we will look at two AI architectures: Crew and Graph. They both tackle tasks differently!

cards.title: What are Crew and Graph Designs?
cards.body: Crew designs organize multiple AI agents that work together as a team. Graph designs use connections between data points to guide decisions.

cards.title: Like Teamwork vs Web Connections
cards.body: Think of Crew as a soccer team, where players coordinate to score a goal, while Graph is like a spider web, where each connection influences the others.

cards.title: Example of Crew vs Graph
cards.body: In a Crew design, agents might pass information like players sharing the ball. In a Graph, data points connect like pathways that lead to certain conclusions.

cards.title: Myth: Crew is Always Better
cards.body: It's a myth that Crew designs are always superior. Each has strengths depending on the task at hand.

cards.title: Visual Comparison
cards.body: Let's see how Crew and Graph handle tasks differently!

options.text: A single agent making decisions alone.
A group of agents working together as a team.
Data points connected only by distance.

exercises.explain: Crew Design refers to multiple agents collaborating to accomplish tasks effectively.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Graph Designs work well for tasks needing individual decisions only.
exercises.explain: False. Graph Designs are good at connecting data points and making decisions based on these connections.

exercises.prompt: Crew designs organize agents like a __________ team.
exercises.sentence: Crew designs organize agents like a soccer team.
exercises.explain: The correct word is 'soccer' because the analogy illustrates teamwork similar to how Crew designs function.

exercises.prompt: Which statement about Graph Designs is AI-generated?

options.text: Graph Designs are just like solo performers.
Graph Designs shine when connecting multiple data points.
Graph Designs require no connections at all.

exercises.explain: The second option is correct because Graph Designs excel in handling relationships and connections between data points.

exercises.prompt: What is a key difference between Crew and Graph designs?

options.text: Crew designs focus on individuals, while Graph designs prioritize teamwork.
Crew designs work as a team, while Graph designs use connections between data points.
Crew designs ignore connections, while Graph designs only focus on tasks.
Crew designs require less planning than Graph designs.

exercises.explain: The correct answer is that Crew designs emphasize teamwork and collaboration among agents, while Graph designs leverage the connections between data points to make informed decisions.
